problem: Healthcare payers and providers struggle with disconnected systems for claims processing, revenue cycle management, and payer-provider communication that increases administrative costs and delays payments.
solution: Cognizant TriZetto provides healthcare technology solutions including the Facets core administration platform and TriZetto Unify framework for payer-provider connectivity. They process 4.4 billion annual transactions and help organizations reduce denials by 30%, increase claims auto-adjudication to 94%, and accelerate collections.
